ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Order ID associated with the sales transaction */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of items sold in the order */,
  "total_profit" REAL /* Total profit from the order */,
  "returns" INTEGER /* Number of returns for the order */,
  "ship_mode_embedding" TEXT /* Embedding representing the shipping mode */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the delivery address */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the order was delivered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date of the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the order */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Current status of the delivery */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for returns */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Customer review rating */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Customer review comments */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES locations ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "state_embedding" TEXT /* Embedding representing the state */,
  "region_embedding" TEXT /* Embedding representing the region */,
  "city" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_embedding" TEXT /* Embedding representing the category */,
  "subcategory_embedding" TEXT /* Embedding representing the subcategory */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's shipping address */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the customer is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES locations ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, logout, query) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
